title: EIP-8142: Block-in-Blobs (BiB)
description: Ensures execution payload data availability via blobs
author: Kevaundray Wedderburn (@kevaundray), Ignacio Hagopian (@jsign), Jihoon Song <jihoon.song@ethereum.org>, Francesco Risitano (@frisitano), Thomas Thiery (@soispoke) <thomas.thiery@ethereum.org>, Toni Wahrstätter (@nerolation), Péter Garamvölgyi (@thegaram)
